title: crataegus crus-galli var. attenuata
intro: Crataegus crus-galli var. attenuata, also known as the scrub hawthorn, is a shrub or small tree species within the hawthorn family (Crataegus) that is native to eastern Asia. The scrub hawthorn is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardio-protective effects, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The health benefits of Crataegus crus-galli var. attenuata include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving heart function, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The herbal preparations of scrub hawthorn can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
